title: lotus callis-viridis
intro: Lotus callis-viridis is a species of flowering plant that belongs to the Nelumbo genus, commonly known as the lotus or water lily. This aquatic plant has been used in traditional medicine for its various medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral activities. The health benefits of lotus callis-viridis include reducing inflammation, improving immune function, and providing antioxidant protection, making it a valuable remedy for various ailments. Herbal preparations of lotus callis-viridis can be found in the form of teas, infusions, and capsules, and are often used to support overall well-being and promote a healthy lifestyle.
